source_document: Tariff Book TRANSNET NATIONAL PORTS AUTHORITY April 2024 to March 2025 Twenty Third Edition 1 April 2024

rules.name: Light Dues
rules.notes: Charged at the first South African port of call, valid for 60 days within SA waters. Rate for 'All other vessels' per 100 GT or part thereof.

rules.name: Port Dues
rules.notes: Basic fee per 100 GT or part thereof, plus a daily rate per 100 GT or part thereof for each 24-hour period or part thereof. Applies generally to all vessels in Durban.

rules.name: Towage Dues
rules.notes: Banded rates for Durban based on vessel GT. Charged per service (entering and leaving). 'Up to 2000 tons' is a flat fee. Subsequent bands have a base fee plus an incremental charge per 100 GT above the band's floor.

rules.name: VTS Dues
rules.notes: Charged per GT per port call for Durban. Subject to a minimum fee.

rules.name: Pilotage Dues
rules.notes: Basic fee per service (entering or leaving) plus a rate per 100 GT or part thereof for Durban.

rules.name: Running of Vessel Lines
rules.notes: Charged as berthing services. Basic fee per service (entering or leaving) plus a rate per 100 GT or part thereof. Durban uses the 'Other Ports' column as it is not explicitly listed in the table.
